1.0.1.en: implement sync lock for Bosch K30/K40 devices

1.0.2.en: Implement poll lock to prevent concurrent `syncDeviceState` calls for Bosch K30/K40 devices

1.0.3.en: fix double trigger on flow cards

1.1.0.en: moved auth status to settings and added repair device option

1.2.0.en: Remove repair flow and replace with reauthorization via app settings for Bosch K30/K40 devices

1.2.3.en: Add GitHub support link in app.json and .homeycompose/app.json

1.2.5.en: Update login instructions: require Chrome instead of generic browser for compatibility

1.2.6.en: Revise README files: add GitHub support link and issue reporting details, and include question issue template.

1.2.7.en: Updated Readme and Device Pairing Flow

1.3.0.en: Add repair flow for Bosch HomeCom: implement re-login with proactive token handling

1.4.0.en: Add re-authentication support and improve error handling for Bosch HomeCom API requests

1.4.1.en: Fix device unavailable after pairing despite valid authentication

1.5.0.en: Add diagnostic logging framework with UI and enhance error handling across API and device interactions
